# ona_organization_policies (List Resource)

Lists the singleton Ona organization policies resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "ona_organization_policies" "all" {
  provider         = ona
  include_resource = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `organization_id` (String) Organization ID to list policies for. Defaults to the authenticated organization.
